pr.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash + MuonWD + SWA (mean val_bpb=1.1483)

output.summary: Int6 quantization lets a 9-layer GPT scale to 3× MLP width while SmearGate/BigramHash embeddings and muP-informed Muon+SWA refine training.
techniques: Per-row int6 quantization frees budget for 3× MLP expansion
SmearGate and BigramHash embeddings inject learned bigram context
Muon WD with orthogonal init plus SWA smooths quantized weights
